description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and runs a before_script that replaces the placeholder CI_MOD_VERSION with $CI_BUILD_REF in build.gradle and src/main/java/de/garantiertnicht/mobexample/MobExample.java, makes gradlew executable, and runs ./gradlew setupCiWorkspace. Define a single build stage. Add a development job in the build stage that runs on all refs except the master branch of the Garantiertnicht/MobTest project and pipeline triggers, and executes ./gradlew build. Add a release job in the same stage that runs only on the master branch of that project and on triggers, runs ./gradlew build, then pack200 -q -E9 build/libs/mobtest-$CI_BUILD_REF.pack.gz build/libs/mobtest-$CI_BUILD_REF.jar, moves the generated pack.gz file to the project root, and publishes mobtest-$CI_BUILD_REF.pack.gz as a job artifact.
